prose: The Fukui-reactivity calculation on phenol using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase has been completed. The computed Fukui zero value (indicating the change in electron density upon removal or addition of an electron) is approximately 0.04946 (units depend on the specific Fukui function considered). The calculation converged successfully, with some warnings about charge conservation drift suggesting that the N→1 states may not have fully converged.
